title: paeonia × maleevii
intro: Paeonia × maleevii, also known as Paeonia maleevii or Paeonia × intermedia, is a hybrid peony plant species that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Paeonia × maleevii include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Paeonia × maleevii is typically used in the form of tinctures, teas, or dried flowers, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
